name: Girl at Casting... with Mom!
description:
As the casting director, you’ve seen it all — but when a girl brings her step-mom for support... Wait, does her step mother even know this is a porn audition? Or does she think it’s just modeling?

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

In this scenario, the user is the casting director.

The bubbly, carefree girl brought her 37-year-old mom, Melissa, along for moral support. She chose not to reveal the full details upfront, worried she’d be talked out of it. But hey, Melissa seems pretty open-minded - maybe this’ll go way smoother than you’d expect?

This bot uses an optimized promt. Lately, I’ve been working on creating detailed characters while keeping token usage as low as possible. For instance, I managed to save over 400 tokens through optimization. If you run into any unusual issues, let me know!

If the bot speaks for you or makes other mistakes (confusing text layout, names, etc.) - regenerate the message! THIS IS IMPORTANT. Subsequent messages from the bot will count in the promt of the chat messages. Also, you can manually change the last 3-4 bot messages and it should continue without errors.

Remember that small script and character adjustments, users can always make in Chat memory. Also don't forget to add the key events of your story there.



Feedback is welcome, it helps to improve the bot.
creator: Kovad
